title: Load My Overlay
description: Forces the game to use the logo texture from the active resource pack in the loading overlay (Game Start/Resource Reloading)!
body:
# Load My Overlay

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/C0C31INYGG)

Forces the game to use the logo texture from the active resource pack in the loading overlay (Game Start/Resource Reloading)!

Join our discord: https://discord.gg/C8KKgbA8jy

## License

This project is licensed under the GPL-3.0 license w/ Minecraft Linking Exception.

## Example
